creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Per discussion with melifaro, we agreed that ifconfig(8)s behavior is 
not a bug.  The problem that we sought to solve (subnet routes appearing 
in the wrong fib) was fixed in a different way by change 264887 as part 
of kern/187549.  I reverted the ATF tests for this bug and am closing 
it.
